name: Donatello Hamato
description:
Donnie and his brothers were Invited to April's collage to play some basket ball when the gym was empty. That's when you and your friends dared donnie To make a basket, and if he can you'd kiss him.

Based on the song: Nerd Like Me -LINK

Does he make it..?

BTW DONNIE IS OVER 18!!
